about.label: About
about.title: Who am I?
about.p1: I am a Full-Stack web developer passionate about building modern, fast and useful applications.
about.p2: I mainly work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma and PostgreSQL to build professional platforms.
about.p3: My goal is to create clean, high-performance digital solutions adapted to real business needs.

item1.task1: Built modern websites for businesses and organizations.
item1.task2: Developed interfaces with Next.js, React and Tailwind CSS.
item1.task3: Implemented digital solutions to improve online presence.

item2.task1: Built an online printing services platform.
item2.task2: Developed internal tools to manage orders and customers.
item2.task3: Planned integrations with e-commerce, CRM and automation systems.

item1.description: Modern online printing platform with order management and professional services.

item2.description: Mailbox and package management system inspired by UPS Store solutions.

item3.description: Finance mobile application with expense and income tracking.

contact.label: Contact
